name: vtex-landing-builder
description: Herramienta externa para crear landing pages autoadministrables en VTEX IO

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=backend && npm install --workspace=frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.setup:production: node -e "const os = require('os'); const isWindows = os.platform() === 'win32'; const script = isWindows ? 'scripts/deploy-production.bat' : 'scripts/deploy-production.sh'; const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { execSync(isWindows ? script : `chmod +x ${script} && ./${script}`, { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch (error) { console.error('Error:', error.message); process.exit(1); }"
